# Deprecated: Staging → Main PR draft

**Do not use for current workflow.** The repository integrates on **`main`** and releases on **`production`**. The historical **`staging`** integration branch is obsolete; a branch named `staging` may still exist only for CI compatibility.

For the correct branch model and hosting split (Vercel vs Appwrite), see:

- `docs/platform-map.md`
- `docs/deployment.md`

---

## Historical content (archived wording)

The text below described an old merge pattern (**base: main**, **compare: staging**). It is kept only so old links do not 404; ignore the procedure.

<details>
<summary>Original draft (obsolete)</summary>

Use this when opening a pull request with **base: main**, **compare: staging**.

Merge staging into main: recurring task scopes, QA audit hardening, repo restructure (docs/AGENTS.md), env/CI and testing upgrades, and verification fixes. Ready pending verification.
